page_content:
GEMS397 Team Project Seminar IV (2 Credits)

This is the fourth of six seminars during which Gemstone students carry out interdisciplinary research with the guidance of a faculty mentor. The team further develops its website. Also they will prepare and present the team project in the poster session of Undergraduate Research Day. Prerequisite: GEMS396.

Restriction: Must be in the Gemstone program with junior standing ina research team.
